title: spec-kitty next --result success --json + on-disk profile-invocation lifecycle
description: Locks behavior for FR-007 / FR-010. After `spec-kitty next --result <outcome> --json` advances a previously issued action, the on-disk lifecycle records under `.kittify/events/profile-invocations/` MUST contain a paired `started`/`completed` entry whose `action` matches the issued step and whose `outcome` is in the canonical vocabulary.

advanced_action.description: Action identity that was advanced; matches the previously issued step's `action`.

x-on-disk-lifecycle.description: Files that must exist under `.kittify/events/profile-invocations/` after a successful advance.

action.description: Must match the issued step's `action` (FR-007 identity match).

outcome.description: Required when event == 'completed'. Must be in the accepted vocabulary.

x-on-disk-lifecycle.policy: The E2E asserts paired `started` + `completed` records exist for every action it issues and advances. Absence of the directory or any required record fails the test (FR-010).
